sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91447" key="puknosfuci/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυκνο-σφυξία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a <sense id="n91447.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">frequent pulse</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0667.tlg001:260" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marcellin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Puls.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">260</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
